pillars.name: Communication + Argumentation
pillars.description: Building strong communicators who listen, reason, and persuade effectively

pillars.name: Creativity + Curiosity
pillars.description: Nurturing creative thinkers who generate, evaluate, and apply ideas

pillars.name: AI + Systems Thinking + Builder Mindset
pillars.description: Developing AI-fluent systems thinkers who build real solutions

pillars.name: Math + Logic + Reasoning
pillars.description: Strengthening logical reasoning, probability, and mathematical foundations

capabilities.name: Listening & Comprehension
capabilities.description: Understanding others' ideas accurately before responding

capabilities.name: Adaptive Communication
capabilities.description: Adjusting communication style for different audiences and purposes

capabilities.name: Dialogue & Debate
capabilities.description: Engaging in productive dialogue, including defending opposing views

capabilities.name: Creative Depth
capabilities.description: Developing, evaluating, and connecting ideas across domains

capabilities.name: Curiosity Drive
capabilities.description: Asking questions and exploring topics with genuine curiosity

capabilities.name: Creative Application
capabilities.description: Applying creativity to real-world problems and designs

capabilities.name: AI Understanding
capabilities.description: Understanding AI capabilities, limitations, and responsible use

capabilities.name: AI Fluency
capabilities.description: Using AI tools effectively through iteration and collaboration

capabilities.name: Systems Thinking
capabilities.description: Analyzing systems through inputs, processes, outputs, and feedback

capabilities.name: Builder Mindset
capabilities.description: Identifying needs, making trade-offs, and delivering products

capabilities.name: Logical Reasoning
capabilities.description: Pattern recognition, boolean logic, and structured reasoning

capabilities.name: Probabilistic & Statistical Reasoning
capabilities.description: Understanding probability, sets, correlation, and data interpretation

capabilities.name: Abstract & Strategic Reasoning
capabilities.description: Working with variables, game theory, and cost-benefit analysis

capabilities.name: Math Foundations
capabilities.description: Core math skills: number sense, fractions, decimals, ratios, algebra, geometry

competencies.name: Active listening & paraphrasing
competencies.description: Can repeat back someone's idea in own words accurately

competencies.name: Identifying claims vs. supporting detail
competencies.description: Knows what the main point is vs. the evidence

competencies.name: Claim with reason
competencies.description: Gives 'because' when stating a position — not just the position

competencies.name: Fact vs. opinion vs. misleading
competencies.description: Correctly categorizes statements as fact, opinion, or misleading

competencies.name: Logical argument chains
competencies.description: Builds premise → premise → conclusion without contradiction

competencies.name: Fallacy identification
competencies.description: Spots common fallacies in others' arguments

competencies.name: Audience adaptation
competencies.description: Genuinely changes explanation for different listeners

competencies.name: Ethical persuasion
competencies.description: Uses logic + emotion + clarity without manipulation

competencies.name: Constructive feedback
competencies.description: Gives specific, actionable feedback; receives without defensiveness

competencies.name: Argue the opposing side
competencies.description: Can coherently defend a position they disagree with

competencies.name: Justified position change
competencies.description: Changes mind AND says why (not social conformity)

competencies.name: Conflict navigation
competencies.description: De-escalates, finds common ground, proposes resolution

competencies.name: Fluency — quantity of ideas
competencies.description: Generates 5+ ideas when prompted, moves past the obvious

competencies.name: Flexible categorization
competencies.description: Can regroup the same items in completely different ways

competencies.name: Hypothetical reasoning
competencies.description: Asks 'what if' unprompted; reasons about counterfactuals

competencies.name: Idea elaboration over time
competencies.description: Takes a rough idea and develops it across sessions

competencies.name: Idea evaluation & critique
competencies.description: Can judge which ideas are stronger and articulate why

competencies.name: Cross-domain connection
competencies.description: Links ideas from unrelated fields ('this is like...')

competencies.name: Unprompted question-asking
competencies.description: Asks questions nobody assigned them to ask

competencies.name: Sustained deep exploration
competencies.description: Returns to the same topic across sessions; goes 10+ turns deep

competencies.name: Understanding-seeking over answer-getting
competencies.description: Uses resources to understand WHY, not just get THE answer

competencies.name: Real-world problem framing
competencies.description: Identifies a genuine problem worth solving, not a toy scenario

competencies.name: Design under constraints
competencies.description: Creates solutions within stated limitations

competencies.name: Human vs. AI creative judgment
competencies.description: Knows when AI output is generic vs. when human judgment adds value

competencies.name: AI as tool, not truth
competencies.description: Knows AI can be wrong, isn't magic, is a tool

competencies.name: Instruction clarity to systems
competencies.description: Gives precise, unambiguous instructions

competencies.name: Structured prompting (CLEAR)
competencies.description: Applies framework: Context, Limits, Examples, Audience, Refine

competencies.name: Hallucination detection
competencies.description: Tags AI responses as reliable/unsure/dangerous accurately

competencies.name: Prompt iteration
competencies.description: Refines prompt when output is unsatisfactory instead of giving up

competencies.name: Agent workflow design
competencies.description: Plans step-by-step AI workflows with verification + fallback

competencies.name: AI as collaborator
competencies.description: Uses AI for brainstorming then applies own judgment to filter/select

competencies.name: Input → Process → Output modeling
competencies.description: Can decompose any system into I→P→O

competencies.name: Feedback loop identification
competencies.description: Spots where outputs feed back as inputs; understands amplification/dampening

competencies.name: Fairness & bias recognition
competencies.description: Identifies when a system/AI produces biased outcomes and explains why

competencies.name: User need identification
competencies.description: Conducts research, identifies pain points, prioritizes by impact

competencies.name: Trade-off reasoning in design
competencies.description: Makes decisions with explicit 'we chose X because, the downside is...'

competencies.name: End-to-end product delivery
competencies.description: Takes idea from concept → prototype → pitch → delivery

competencies.name: Pattern recognition
competencies.description: Identifies rules in visual/numeric sequences

competencies.name: Logic gates (AND/OR/NOT)
competencies.description: Applies boolean logic correctly

competencies.name: Decision tree construction
competencies.description: Builds valid if/else trees

competencies.name: If/then chain reasoning
competencies.description: Follows multi-step implications without contradiction

competencies.name: Cognitive bias identification
competencies.description: Recognizes biases in own and others' thinking

competencies.name: Set theory & Venn reasoning
competencies.description: Classifies correctly, handles overlaps

competencies.name: Basic probability
competencies.description: Calculates simple probabilities correctly

competencies.name: Conditional probability
competencies.description: Handles Monty Hall-type problems; avoids gambler's fallacy

competencies.name: Correlation vs. causation
competencies.description: Distinguishes 'X correlates with Y' from 'X causes Y'

competencies.name: Data interpretation & prediction
competencies.description: Reads graphs, identifies trends, makes justified predictions

competencies.name: Variables & functional relationships
competencies.description: Understands input→output rules, can generalize

competencies.name: Game theory basics
competencies.description: Identifies dominant strategies, understands Nash equilibrium intuitively

competencies.name: Cost-benefit analysis
competencies.description: Weighs trade-offs quantitatively

competencies.name: Place value & basic operations
competencies.description: Large numbers, place value, estimation, basic operations

competencies.name: HCF, LCM & prime numbers
competencies.description: Numbers up to crores, HCF, LCM, prime & composite

competencies.name: Integers & negative numbers
competencies.description: Whole number properties, introduction to integers & negative numbers

competencies.name: Integer operations
competencies.description: Integer operations, multiplication & division of integers

competencies.name: Rational numbers
competencies.description: Rational numbers, properties, representation on number line

competencies.name: Real & irrational numbers
competencies.description: Real number system, irrational numbers, rationalising denominators

competencies.name: Equivalent fractions
competencies.description: Introduction to fractions, equivalent fractions, comparing with same denominator

competencies.name: Adding & subtracting fractions
competencies.description: Like & unlike fractions, addition & subtraction of fractions

competencies.name: Unlike denominator operations
competencies.description: Types of fractions, comparison, addition & subtraction with unlike denominators

competencies.name: Multiplying & dividing fractions
competencies.description: Multiplication & division of fractions and decimals

competencies.name: Intro to decimals
competencies.description: Introduction to decimals, place value, basic comparison

competencies.name: Decimal arithmetic
competencies.description: Decimal place value, addition & subtraction of decimals

competencies.name: Decimal-fraction conversion
competencies.description: Multiplication & division of decimals, conversion to fractions

competencies.name: Ratios & proportion
competencies.description: Concept of ratio, equivalent ratios, proportion, unitary method

competencies.name: Percentages & profit/loss
competencies.description: Percentages, profit/loss, simple interest

competencies.name: Compound interest & tax
competencies.description: Compound interest, discount, tax, increase/decrease percent

competencies.name: Number patterns & sequences
competencies.description: Number patterns, growing patterns, rule-based sequences

competencies.name: Variables & expressions
competencies.description: Variables, expressions, simple equations, use of variables in patterns

competencies.name: Simple equations
competencies.description: Simple equations in one variable, algebraic expressions, like terms

competencies.name: Linear equations & identities
competencies.description: Linear equations, algebraic identities, factorisation of expressions

competencies.name: Polynomials & factor theorem
competencies.description: Polynomials, remainder & factor theorem, linear equations in two variables

competencies.name: 2D shapes & symmetry
competencies.description: 2D shapes, symmetry, tessellations, basic pattern recognition

competencies.name: Angles, triangles & area
competencies.description: Angles, triangles, circles, nets of 3D shapes, area & perimeter of rectangles

competencies.name: Lines, angles & quadrilaterals
competencies.description: Points, lines, rays, angles, basic triangles, quadrilaterals, circles

competencies.name: Congruence & area formulas
competencies.description: Congruence of triangles, parallel lines, area of parallelogram/triangle/circle

competencies.name: Pythagoras & 3D solids
competencies.description: Quadrilateral properties, Pythagoras theorem, surface area & volume of solids

competencies.name: Proofs, circles & constructions
competencies.description: Euclid's geometry, triangle proofs, circles, constructions, Heron's formula
